_comment: Gríma Wormtongue (LTR, {2}{B} legendary 1/4). Static: opponents can't gain life. Activated: {T}, Sacrifice another creature: Target player loses 1 life; if the sacrificed creature was legendary, amass Orcs 2. The board has BOTH a nonlegendary (Snarling Warg) and a legendary (Faramir, Field Commander) creature so the player can demo both branches of the rider. Gríma starts untapped, no summoning sickness.
